title: payment — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — customer manages own payment methods + views own payments + intents + own dispute status; admin+finance manages provider CRUD + captures + dispute evidence. Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant support tooling for ops + support cross-tenant P1 review. All tenant-plane permissions carry the `payment.` prefix (or `platform.payment.` on the platform audience) per hierarchy.md §4 audience-boundary rules.

permissions.name: payment.payments.view
permissions.description: Customer sees own payments via invoice.customer_id scoping.

permissions.name: payment.payments.capture
permissions.description: Manual capture for authorization holds. Requires `payment_manual_capture` entitlement.

permissions.name: payment.methods.create
permissions.description: Save a new payment method via SetupIntent flow.

permissions.name: payment.methods.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete a saved method. Customer can delete own; admin can delete any tenant method.

permissions.name: payment.intents.create
permissions.description: Create a new payment intent for an invoice.

permissions.name: payment.intents.confirm
permissions.description: Confirm an intent from the customer's SDK.

permissions.name: payment.disputes.view
permissions.description: Customer sees status of their own disputes only.

permissions.name: payment.disputes.submit-evidence
permissions.description: Submit collected evidence to the provider.

permissions.name: payment.disputes.accept
permissions.description: Accept the dispute — concede + refund via the refund module.

permissions.name: payment.providers.view
permissions.description: Config field returned encrypted; support role sees redacted view.

permissions.name: payment.providers.create
permissions.description: Configure a new payment provider. Credentials are financial-critical.

permissions.name: payment.providers.test
permissions.description: Send a synthetic test event via a provider's sandbox endpoint.

permissions.name: payment.providers.reconcile
permissions.description: Trigger on-demand reconciliation for a provider.

permissions.name: platform.payment.methods.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant methods read (encrypted fields never decrypted).

permissions.name: platform.payment.disputes.accept
permissions.description: Cross-tenant support-intervention accept. Every fire notifies the tenant admin + writes audit with 7-year retention.

permissions.name: platform.payment.providers.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant provider config read (redacted — no credentials).

permissions.name: platform.payment.pii.view
permissions.description: Reveal PII fields on payments (customer name, email, phone, billing address). Highly restricted — requires explicit compliance approval workflow.
